title: Stories about Fear and Intimidation at Work 2008-2009
description: The qualitative dataset consists of 102 accounts of people's experiences of fear and intimidation at work in Finland. The participants were asked to provide some essential background variables such as their gender, the branch and size of the organisation etc. They were asked to describe what they were afraid of and why, what had led to the situation and by what means had they been intimidated. The writers were also invited to describe situations where they themselves had resorted to intimidation
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
